name: Hedef Girisim Sermayesi Yatirim Ortakligi A.S.
summary: Hedef Girisim Sermayesi Yatirim Ortakligi A.S. is a venture capital and private equity firm specializing in middle market and growth capital investments. It provides venture capital to entrepreneurs and SMEs in Turkey. It also offers managerial and strategic support services. Hedef Girisim Sermayesi Yatirim Ortakligi A.S. is based in Istanbul, Turkey.
